sourcesContent:
import React, { useState } from 'react'; import './BoxScore.css'; export default function BoxScore({ game }) { const [activeTeam, setActiveTeam] = useState('home'); if (!game || !game.boxScore) { return (
No box score available for this game.
); } const { boxScore, score } = game; const displayStats = activeTeam === 'home' ? boxScore.home : boxScore.away; // Calculate team totals const totals = displayStats.reduce((acc, stat) => ({ minutes: acc.minutes + stat.minutes, points: acc.points + stat.points, fgm: acc.fgm + stat.fgm, fga: acc.fga + stat.fga, tpm: acc.tpm + stat.tpm, tpa: acc.tpa + stat.tpa, ftm: acc.ftm + stat.ftm, fta: acc.fta + stat.fta, rebounds: acc.rebounds + stat.rebounds, assists: acc.assists + stat.assists, steals: acc.steals + stat.steals, blocks: acc.blocks + stat.blocks, turnovers: acc.turnovers + stat.turnovers, fouls: acc.fouls + stat.fouls, }), { minutes: 0, points: 0, fgm: 0, fga: 0, tpm: 0, tpa: 0, ftm: 0, fta: 0, rebounds: 0, assists: 0, steals: 0, blocks: 0, turnovers: 0, fouls: 0 }); const fgPct = totals.fga > 0 ? ((totals.fgm / totals.fga) * 100).toFixed(1) : '0.0'; const tpPct = totals.tpa > 0 ? ((totals.tpm / totals.tpa) * 100).toFixed(1) : '0.0'; const ftPct = totals.fta > 0 ? ((totals.ftm / totals.fta) * 100).toFixed(1) : '0.0'; return (

Box Score

{displayStats.map((stat, i) => ( ))}
Player MIN PTS FG 3PT FT REB AST STL BLK TO PF
{stat.playerName} {i < 5 && S} {stat.minutes === 0 ? 'DNP' : stat.minutes} {stat.points} {stat.fgm}-{stat.fga} {stat.tpm}-{stat.tpa} {stat.ftm}-{stat.fta} {stat.rebounds} {stat.assists} {stat.steals} {stat.blocks} {stat.turnovers} {stat.fouls}
TEAM TOTALS 240 {totals.points} {totals.fgm}-{totals.fga} {totals.tpm}-{totals.tpa} {totals.ftm}-{totals.fta} {totals.rebounds} {totals.assists} {totals.steals} {totals.blocks} {totals.turnovers} {totals.fouls}
FG% {fgPct}%
3P% {tpPct}%
FT% {ftPct}%
Rebounds {totals.rebounds}
Assists {totals.assists}
Turnovers {totals.turnovers}
); }
